checks.name: interviews_without_users
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM interviews WHERE user_id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM users)

checks.name: answers_without_interviews
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM answers WHERE interview_id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM interviews)

checks.name: answers_without_questions
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM answers WHERE question_id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM questions)

checks.name: feedback_without_users
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM feedback WHERE user_id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM users)

checks.name: feedback_without_answers
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM feedback WHERE answer_id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM answers)
